last_cycle_summary: Completed a fourth bounded Review Studio cycle after re-reading V1 planning/status files, the shared V1 contract facade, existing Review/Memo/Gate UI, Remote Matter review/export routes, and current status rollups. Preserved local and Remote Matter unresolved-review visibility, then added a local-only V1 eval fixture into the Remote Matter feedback dataset export path using shared ReviewComment conversion and createV1EvalCaseFixture. The fixture carries an explicit durable-review-resolution limitation, so this does not claim persisted review-to-eval workflow readiness.

approve_reject_comment_evidence.evidence: Existing evidence approve/reject controls, fact override text area, and add-review flow in AletheiaWorkspace were left intact.

unresolved_review_visibility.evidence: deriveReviewStudioModel returns unresolvedComments for non-accepted review records with target type/id, reviewer comment, severity, sourceEvidenceIds, and resolutionCue. RemoteMatterSidebar now renders non-accepted persisted review rows in an Open Review Comments panel.

memo_section_review.evidence: ReviewStudioMemoLink now includes unresolvedReviewIds for direct memo_section comments, and AletheiaWorkspace renders an open-review badge on affected memo sections.

gate_failure_resolution_cues.evidence: Unresolved review comments now include deterministic resolutionCue text and feed Review Studio gate reasons without changing Gate Engine final export fail-closed behavior.

source_linked_review_comments.evidence: Local Review Studio comments resolve to source evidence IDs. Remote Matter review rows now enter buildFinalMemoGateInput as shared ReviewComment records with target_type, target_id, tag, work_product_id, evidence_item_id, and referenced_artifacts for the reviewed artifact plus source evidence item.

remote_matter_review_visibility.evidence: RemoteMatterSidebar now shows open review comments with target type/id, work product ID, evidence item ID, source chunk ID, and the linked evidence quote when available.

review_to_eval_handoff.evidence: buildFeedbackDataset now includes v1EvalCaseFixture generated by createV1EvalCaseFixture from source-linked ReviewComment records, with a local-only limitation that durable review-resolution status is still missing.

blockers: No Review Studio blocker for local unresolved review visibility, Remote Matter source-linked ReviewComment anchors, or Remote Matter open review visibility in this cycle.

Persisted review-resolution API/status semantics remain missing; Remote Matter still derives resolved/open state from accepted versus non-accepted tags, and v1EvalCaseFixture remains local/helper output until durable review state exists.
next_actions: Add a focused persisted ReviewComment resolution action if backend/API scope allows explicit open/resolved state instead of tag-derived resolution.
Consider showing v1EvalCaseFixture counts in the Remote Matter feedback export approval prompt if reviewers need an explicit pre-export cue.
Keep Deployment/Docs/Demo wording clear that review-derived eval cases are local fixture/helper output until durable review-resolution state exists.
